title: Surveillance
content:
The POEA and/or designated officials in the DOLE regional offices may, on their own initiative, conduct surveillance on the alleged illegal recruitment activities.

Within two (2) days from the termination of surveillance, a report supported by an affidavit shall be submitted to the Director-LRO or the Regional Director concerned, as the case may be.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
